China Reports Records Trade Surplus Before Trade War Impacts
data.description:
Catenaa, Monday, April 14, 2025- China’s overall trade surplus hit $ 103 billion in March, official data showed on Monday, as the results of the trade war between China and the US is yet to be seen. According to China Customs, China’s trade surplus surged to $102. 64 billion in March 2025, up from $58. 65 billion […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/china-reports-records-trade-surplus-before-trade-war-impacts

data.title: Shiba Inu Price Teases Climb Amid Bullish Chart Signals
data.description:
The Shiba Inu price flickers with possibility as traders scan charts for signs of a breakout. In the murky calm following recent market turbulence, bullish patterns are surfacing—some subtle, others shouted from the charts. Online analysts mark up their screens with arrows and predictions, hoping the next move is up. But the signals, like the market itself, remain a mix of promise and uncertainty
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/04/14/shiba-inu-price-teases-climb-amid-bullish-chart-signals/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=shiba-inu-price-teases-climb-amid-bullish-chart-signals

data.title: Treasury yields decline after a rollercoaster week as traders digest surprise U.S. tariff exemptions
data.description:
U. S. Treasury yields fell on April 14th as investors reacted to a surprise tariff exemption after a volatile week of trading in the bond market. The 10-year Treasury was down over 0. 04% (over 4 bps) at 4. 452%, and the 2-year Treasury note yield slipped 0. 036% (over 3 bps) to 3. 918%.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/treasury-yields-decline-tariff-exemptions/

data.title: Senator Tim Scott Says Crypto Market Structure Bill To Be Passed by August of This Year
data.description:
Republican Senator Tim Scott of South Carolina says a bill seeking to create a comprehensive regulatory framework for the digital asset space will become law later this year.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/14/senator-tim-scott-says-crypto-market-structure-bill-to-be-passed-by-august-of-this-year/

data.title: Bitcoin traders target $90K as apparent tariff exemptions ease US Treasury yields
data.description:
The 2-year and 10-year US Treasury yields dipped on Monday, April 14, after Bitcoin (BTC) closed its best weekly performance since the second week of January.  Bitcoin gained 6. 79% over the past week, but are enough factors aligned to support continued price upside? The 10-year treasury yield declined by 8. 2 basis points to 4
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-traders-target-90-k-as-apparent-tariff-exemptions-ease-us-treasury-yields?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Binance Founder CZ Denies Testifying Against Justin Sun in DOJ Deal
data.description:
Binance founder Changpeng “CZ” Zhao has denied accusations that he provided testimony against TRON founder Justin Sun as part of a plea deal with the U. S. Department of Justice (DOJ). CZ addressed these allegations through a series of posts on X
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/14/binance-founder-cz-denies-testifying-against-justin-sun-in-doj-deal/
